rulings.Case Title: NORA CORRASCO VS. EVELYN MONTES DE OCA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees Per Cc Section 1717
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 15, 2011, line 1. Motion for attorneys fees off calendar, to be re-noticed for 11/21/11. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY JONES VS. JONATHAN ROSEN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 15, 2011, line 2. Demurrer is sustained with 5 day leave to amend for Plainitff to allege in good faith that tenant was informed in writing on or before the date upon which the notice to vacate was given concerning (1) the grounds under which possession is sought and (2) availability of advice from Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Board. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: DMG ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. AZADEH MOVAGHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 15, 2011, line 3. Motion for Summary judgement granted, subject to opposition. Plaintiff has established undisputed facts that it was the highest bidder at trustees' sale and appears to be a bona fide purchaser for value, defendants were properly served with the appropriate three day notice, defendant remains in possession. Plaintiff appears entitled to possession. CCP 1161a(b)(3). = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NA VS. MISCHA EISNER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 15, 2011, line 7. Motion to Quash service of summons, denied. Five days to respond. Defendant failed to comply with CCP 1167.4(a). = (501/CEAK)
